---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new detector, policy feature, or integration"
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Feature Summary
A clear, concise description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves
What attack or gap does this address? Reference CVEs or OWASP MCP categories if applicable.

## Proposed Solution
How should it work? Include example config/code if possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this
